title: Materials Discarded
query: SELECT SUM(Count) AS total FROM MaterialDiscarded WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT COALESCE(Name_Localised, Name) AS label, SUM(Count) AS value FROM MaterialDiscarded WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY Name ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 20

details.text: {total} material unit(s) discarded during the report period. Discards reveal the hidden friction of material gathering — constantly jettisoning the same material means your inventory cap is perpetually full of lower-value items while you're trying to make room for the G5s you actually need.
details.help: MaterialDiscarded fires when materials are manually discarded to free inventory space. total drives the title as the cumulative discard volume.

tagLines: Material discard log compiled. Inventory culling activity noted in the gathering record.
You found more than your inventory could hold. Something had to go. This is what you let go.
Discarding materials isn't waste — it's a deliberate choice about what your time is worth. Usually.
